entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural management system that aims to achieve sustainable food production by minimizing soil disturbance

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The southern region of the African continent where conservation agriculture is analyzed

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A period of transformation in agriculture characterized by the use of high-yielding varieties and chemical inputs

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of cultivating crops and raising livestock to provide food for the population

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with lower industrialization and income levels facing food production challenges

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the output of agricultural products per unit of input

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed through breeding or biotechnology to enhance yield or traits

entities.name: FERTILIZER
entities.description: Substances applied to soil or plants to provide essential nutrients for growth

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: The use of irrigation and water management to support crop production

entities.name: YIELD GAINS
entities.description: The measurable increase in agricultural output per unit of land

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region of Africa south of the Sahara desert experiencing stagnant yield gains

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The condition where all people have physical, social, and economic access to sufficient, safe, and nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITIOUS FOOD
entities.description: Food that contains a balanced amount of essential nutrients required for health

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A macronutrient essential for building and repairing tissues

entities.name: VITAMINS
entities.description: Micronutrients required in small quantities for various metabolic functions

entities.name: ESSENTIAL MINERALS
entities.description: Inorganic elements necessary for physiological functions in the body

entities.name: HIV/AIDS
entities.description: A chronic health condition that increases the vulnerability of households to food insecurity
